basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: HSSLC, Diploma in Computer Application/Certificate in Computer Application, Typing speed of 30 wpm, Mizo Language Proficiency
qualification.details: Qualification: HSSLC from a recognized institution. Diploma in Computer Application/Certificate in Computer Application from institutions recognized by Mizoram State Council of Technical Education (MSCTE). Typing speed of 30 words per minute. Mizo Language Proficiency qualifying test (HSLC standard).

selection_process: Mizo Language Proficiency Test Written Examination Basic Computer Knowledge & Typing Test Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mamit District Lower Division Clerk (LDC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://mamit.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mamit District LDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Mamit District Lower Division Clerk (LDC) recruitment is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the LDC post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) post in the Mamit District recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the LDC post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed HSSLC from a recognized institution, possess a Diploma in Computer Application/Certificate in Computer Application from MSCTE recognized institutions, and have a typing speed of 30 words per minute. A Mizo Language Proficiency test is also required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the LDC position?
faq.answer: The age limit for applying to the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) post is between 18 years and 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates applying for the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) post in Mamit District.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the Mamit District LDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 200/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 150/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the LDC post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Lower Division Clerk (LDC) post will receive a salary of Rs. 18700 per month, plus 10% Dearness Allowance (DA).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the LDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Mizo Language Proficiency Test, Written Examination, Basic Computer Knowledge & Typing Test, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Mamit District LDC job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Mamit District, which is https://mamit.nic.in. Direct links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
